title: SMCI after the delayed 10-K filing rally (Feb 2025)
description: Research SMCI the day after it filed its delayed FY2024 10-K and regained Nasdaq compliance (Feb 25, 2025): delisting risk cleared, a $40 billion FY26 revenue target on the table, Blackwell rack-scale ramp in full production, and the stock up roughly 90% from its early-February low.
